use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in any application interface
Destructive action triggers with visual warning styling
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
ai_summary: A flexible React button component built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Features accessible focus states, disabled handling, and shadow styling. Can render as native button or polymorphic via asChild prop for composing with other Radix primitives.
